table - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
The table â€” owns the sum and the discard pile view.
Table - Class in com.example._0tazo.model
Represents the physical table in the Cincuentazo game.
Table(Deck) - Constructor for class com.example._0tazo.model.Table
Constructs a Table with a reference to the shared deck.
tablePane - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
 
tableSum - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.model.Table
The running sum of all cards played on the table.
